mapper.select: SELECT p.PLAN_SEQ, p.FAMILY_ID, p.PLAN_NM, p.PLAN_TYPE, t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.AMOUNT, p.CYCLE_NUM, p.CYCLE_UNIT, p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, CONCAT( '매 ', p.CYCLE_NUM, CASE p.CYCLE_UNIT WHEN 'DAY' THEN '일' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN '개월' WHEN 'YEAR' THEN '년' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_UNIT = 'YEAR' AND p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ', p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, '월') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ', p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, '일') ELSE '' END ) AS CYCLE_DESC, p.START_YMD, p.END_YMD, p.COST_CENTER_TYPE, p.COST_CENTER_SEQ, p.LOAN_SEQ, l.LOAN_NM, p.LIVING_TOTAL_LINK_YN, p.USE_YN, p.DEL_YN, p.MEMO, p.REG_ID, p.REG_DT, p.UPD_ID, p.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(p.UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON p.PLAN_TYPE = t.PLAN_TYPE LEFT JOIN LOAN_MST l ON p.LOAN_SEQ = l.LOAN_SEQ WHERE p.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND p.PLAN_SEQ = #{planSeq} AND p.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST ( FAMILY_ID, PLAN_NM, PLAN_TYPE, FLOW_TYPE, AMOUNT, CYCLE_TYPE, CYCLE_NUM, CYCLE_UNIT, CYCLE_BASE_DAY, CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, START_YMD, END_YMD, COST_CENTER_TYPE, COST_CENTER_SEQ, LOAN_SEQ, LIVING_TOTAL_LINK_YN, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{planNm}, #{planType}, #{flowType}, #{amount}, 'CUSTOM', #{cycleNum}, #{cycleUnit}, #{cycleBaseDay}, #{cycleBaseMonth}, #{startYmd}, #{endYmd}, #{costCenterType}, #{costCenterSeq}, #{loanSeq}, #{livingTotalLinkYn}'N', #{useYn}'Y', 'N', #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST SET PLAN_NM = #{planNm}, PLAN_TYPE = #{planType}, FLOW_TYPE = #{flowType}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, CYCLE_NUM = #{cycleNum}, CYCLE_UNIT = #{cycleUnit}, CYCLE_BASE_DAY = #{cycleBaseDay}, CYCLE_BASE_MONTH = #{cycleBaseMonth}, START_YMD = #{startYmd}, END_YMD = #{endYmd}, COST_CENTER_TYPE = #{costCenterType}, COST_CENTER_SEQ = #{costCenterSeq}, LOAN_SEQ = #{loanSeq}, LIVING_TOTAL_LINK_YN = #{livingTotalLinkYn}LIVING_TOTAL_LINK_YN, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MEMO = #{memo}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND PLAN_SEQ = #{planSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND PLAN_SEQ = #{planSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST SET AMOUNT = #{totalAmt}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND LIVING_TOTAL_LINK_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT p.PLAN_SEQ, p.FAMILY_ID, p.PLAN_NM, p.PLAN_TYPE, t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.AMOUNT, p.CYCLE_NUM, p.CYCLE_UNIT, p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, CONCAT('매 ',p.CYCLE_NUM, CASE p.CYCLE_UNIT WHEN 'DAY' THEN '일' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN '개월' WHEN 'YEAR' THEN '년' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_UNIT='YEAR' AND p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ',p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH,'월') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ',p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY,'일') ELSE '' END ) AS CYCLE_DESC, p.START_YMD, p.END_YMD, p.USE_YN, p.DEL_YN, p.MEMO, p.REG_ID, p.UPD_ID, p.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(p.UPD_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON p.PLAN_TYPE = t.PLAN_TYPE WHERE p.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND p.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( p.PLAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR t.PLAN_TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR p.MEMO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ) ORDER BY p.USE_YN DESC, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.PLAN_SEQ DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT p.PLAN_SEQ, p.FAMILY_ID, p.PLAN_NM, p.PLAN_TYPE, t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.AMOUNT, p.CYCLE_NUM, p.CYCLE_UNIT, p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, NULL AS CYCLE_DESC, NULL AS COST_CENTER_TYPE, NULL AS COST_CENTER_SEQ, p.START_YMD, p.END_YMD, p.USE_YN, p.DEL_YN, p.MEMO, p.REG_ID, p.REG_DT, p.UPD_ID, p.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(p.UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON p.PLAN_TYPE = t.PLAN_TYPE WHERE p.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND p.FLOW_TYPE = 'INCOME' AND p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY p.PLAN_NM

SELECT p.PLAN_SEQ, p.FAMILY_ID, p.PLAN_NM, p.PLAN_TYPE, t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.AMOUNT, p.CYCLE_NUM, p.CYCLE_UNIT, p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, NULL AS CYCLE_DESC, p.START_YMD, p.END_YMD, p.USE_YN, p.DEL_YN, p.MEMO, p.REG_ID, p.REG_DT, p.UPD_ID, p.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(p.UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON p.PLAN_TYPE = t.PLAN_TYPE WHERE p.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY p.FLOW_TYPE, p.PLAN_SEQ
